title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.820 - James W Brooks memorial highway designated for a portion of I-70 in St. Louis City and St. Louis County
text:
227.820.  James W Brooks memorial highway designated for a portion of I-70 in St. Louis City and St. Louis County. — The portion of Interstate 70 from Union Boulevard continuing west to State Highway U in St. Louis City and St. Louis County shall be designated as "James W Brooks Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2023 S.B. 127)
